g.text: Step 1 — Navigate to Instructor Weekly Schedule
actor must choose a different semester
Step 3 — Select Instructor and View Schedule
(message: "No classes scheduled for this instructor in this semester")
group entries by day code into grid dict
sort each day's entries by start_time
For each day, compare every pair of classes:
• Skip if same CRN (same class instance)
• Skip if cross-listed UG/GR pair (same title,
one in 4xxx range and one in 5xxx+ range)
• Flag overlap if start_A < end_B AND start_B < end_A
for each day: compare all class pairs
